title: [WIP] Fix ownership of the working dir

comments.body: Changes LGTM, but the tests seemed to have timed out?  Not sure why this change should do that, will rekick them in case it was a hiccup.
No I dug deeper and this is not the right fix.  The issue is imagebuilder is not setting the Buildah User correctly.  I will continue to work on this once I get free from Summit responsibilities.
